query: VHS scanlines TV static analog distortion CRT screen
message: sub:analog_degradation/VHS_CRT — anti_aesthetic — scanlines, TV static, color bars, pixel grids, retro CRT

response.objective_caption: Human figures seated behind a corrugated translucent industrial panel, photographed through its vertical ridges, with horizontal yellow and teal bands visible in the foreground and a gray masonry wall in the background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract photograph of human figures behind a corrugated translucent partition, where the refractive surface smears all detail into ambiguous texture and the subjects dissolve into unrecognizable shapes. The image abandons representational clarity in favor of rhythmic vertical lines and horizontal color bands, rendering the scene as a formal study of industrial pattern and obscured human presence.
